technique: Grayscale and Doppler ultrasound of the liver allograft and abdomen.
findings: Liver allograft of normal echotexture. Patent hepatic artery (normal resistive index), patent main and intrahepatic portal veins (hepatopetal flow), and patent hepatic veins/IVC. NO ascites. Spleen size decreased compared with pre-transplant. No biliary dilation.
impression: Normal post-transplant Doppler study with patent vasculature and NO ascites. Marked interval resolution of the previously large-volume ascites.
comparison: Pre-transplant studies showed cirrhosis, splenomegaly, and large-volume ascites — now resolved.
